jd_text: Graphic Designer / Content & Brand Support We are looking for a versatile and structured graphic profile to strengthen our production, brand presence, and digital visibility. You will work closely with the CEO and act as an operational right hand in developing and maintaining our brand, while also supporting daily structure and coordination. The role combines graphic production, brand maintenance, social media/content execution, and light office administration in Dubai. About ISA Media Group ISA Media Group is a Danish media and communication company established in 2002 . We primarily work with the Scandinavian and German markets , collaborating with some of Denmark’s largest media platforms and delivering advertising, content, and branding solutions to a wide range of clients. ISA Media Group has helped more than 960 Danish companies place over 275,699 advertisements across 875+ Danish media platforms . Your primary responsibilitiesProduction (approx. 50%) Support our Art Director, who is currently handling production independently Produce print ads and graphic materials Assist with magazine layout (InDesign) Support IT & Creative with production tasks Create graphic materials for clients (ads, banners, etc.) Social Media & Content Production Create posts for clients and internal channels Prepare and produce content for social media Adapt visuals to different platforms Work in a structured way with content (production → preparation → publishing) Brand & maintenance (approx. 30%) Work closely with the CEO on developing and maintaining ISA Media Group’s brand Update playbooks and internal materials Maintain internal guides and structure Manage and update website content Upload and structure magazine content online Support visibility of ISA Media Group and our publications across digital platforms Administration (approx. 20%) Light office administration in Dubai Handling receipts and documentation for accounting Structuring, filing, and maintaining internal organization Practical day-to-day coordination Requirements Experience in graphic production (print and digital) Experience with social media, content, and post creation Strong skills in InDesign, Photoshop, and Illustrator Basic understanding of web and content management systems (WordPress, Webflow or similar) Ability to manage multiple tasks and work in a structured way Self-driven and able to take responsibility What you get with us Close collaboration with the CEO and a central role in developing our brand Daily sparring with an Art Director with 28 years of experience An international working environment A company with 25 years of experience in the media industry Opportunity to work with some of Denmark’s largest media platforms You will become part of a company with strong experience, high activity, and a clear focus on execution, structure, and growth. Salary The salary range for this position is AED 5,000 – 8,000 per month , depending on experience and qualifications. We are specifically looking for a candidate with relevant hands-on experience in graphic production, social media content, and digital work.
